title: P3: Validation should also check unique_peers or per-metrics export consistency for roaming nodes
description: Beyond rx_count, validate that out-of-area nodes have fewer unique_peers in their NodeMetrics after roaming, or load the exported JSON and cross-check. Improves coverage of propagation impact. Codereview pass 3.
close_reason: All fixes applied to test_scale.py: non-overlapping roam indices (100-140), conference_area bounds used, rx_count==0 validation for far nodes + unique_peers check. Addresses P0/P2/P3.
